subject: fix(workspace-list): prevent cramped header on mobile
body:
Add flex-wrap and gap-y-3 to the workspace list header so the
Restore and New Workspace buttons wrap below the heading on
narrow screens instead of being squeezed together.

Tags: ui, mobile, layout
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-polish
Semver: patch
